SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE HOUSING_STARTS IS NULL

Description: HOUSING_STARTS must be >= 0. Negative housing starts are physically impossible.
AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD should not be NULL except for suppressed records.
SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD IS NULL AND STATUS != 'F'

Description: AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD must be > 0. Negative prices are invalid.
GEO_CODE must be a valid Canadian province/territory code.
SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE GEO_CODE NOT IN ('ON','BC','AB','QC','MB','SK','NS','NB','NL','PE','NT','YT','NU')

Description: DWELLING_TYPE must be one of 5 approved categories.
SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE DWELLING_TYPE NOT IN (...approved list...)

Description: INTENDED_MARKET must be one of: Homeowner, Rental, Condominium.
SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE INTENDED_MARKET NOT IN ('Homeowner','Rental','Condominium')
SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE REF_DATE NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}$'

Description: Each combination of REF_DATE + GEO_CODE + DWELLING_TYPE + INTENDED_MARKET must be unique.
SQL_Logic: SELECT REF_DATE, GEO_CODE, DWELLING_TYPE, INTENDED_MARKET, COUNT(*) FROM housing_starts GROUP BY ... HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

Description: REF_DATE must not be after the current month.
SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE REF_DATE > TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')

Description: STATUS must be one of: blank (final), E (estimated), F (suppressed), r (revised).
SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE STATUS NOT IN ('', 'E', 'F', 'r')

Description: HOUSING_STARTS must fall within a statistically plausible range. Values above 20000 or above mean + 3 std dev per province are flagged as potential outliers requiring steward review.
SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE HOUSING_STARTS > 20000 OR HOUSING_STARTS > (SELECT AVG(HOUSING_STARTS) + 3 * STDDEV(HOUSING_STARTS) FROM housing_starts h2 WHERE h2.GEO_CODE = housing_starts.GEO_CODE)

Description: AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD must be between $100,000 and $3,000,000 AND not exceed mean + 3 std dev within the same province. Values outside this range are flagged for steward review.
SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD < 100000 OR AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD > 3000000 OR AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD > (SELECT AVG(AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD) + 3 * STDDEV(AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD) FROM housing_starts h2 WHERE h2.GEO_CODE = housing_starts.GEO_CODE AND h2.AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD IS NOT NULL)

Description: GEO (full province name) and GEO_CODE (2-letter code) must always refer to the same province. Any mismatch indicates a data entry or join error.
SQL_Logic: SELECT * FROM housing_starts WHERE (GEO = 'Ontario' AND GEO_CODE != 'ON') OR (GEO = 'British Columbia' AND GEO_CODE != 'BC') OR (GEO = 'Alberta' AND GEO_CODE != 'AB') OR (GEO = 'Quebec' AND GEO_CODE != 'QC') OR (GEO = 'Manitoba' AND GEO_CODE != 'MB') OR (GEO = 'Saskatchewan' AND GEO_CODE != 'SK') OR (GEO = 'Nova Scotia' AND GEO_CODE != 'NS') OR (GEO = 'New Brunswick' AND GEO_CODE != 'NB') OR (GEO = 'Newfoundland and Labrador' AND GEO_CODE != 'NL') OR (GEO = 'Prince Edward Island' AND GEO_CODE != 'PE')
